Notice And Motion For Change Of Venue
Off Calendar Jan-07-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT WINCO FOODS, LLC Motion for Change of Venue from San Francisco County, Superior Court to the Superior Court of Contra Costa County, State of California. Appearances: Dwayne Timmof, Esq., of Nisson, Pincin & Hill (530) 246-4201 x 100, appearing for Defendant Winco Foods, LLC and moving party; William F. Fitzgerald, Esq. of Narayan & Hudson, (415) 227-2328 appearing for Defendant Source Refrigeration & HVAC, Inc., (and not opposing motion); Joe Pat Hawkins, In Pro Per Plaintiff and Paula Hawkins In Pro Per Plaintiff (925) 439-7079 Appearing thru CourtCall, and opposing party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion granted as to Paula Hawkins (Joe Pat Hawkins has been declared a vexatious litigant). Case transferred to Contra Costa County where the alleged incident occurred. (CCP section 395.5.) (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

Motion To Oppose Change Of Venue And Transfer
Off Calendar Jan-07-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFFS PAULA HAWKINS, and, JOE HAWKINS Motion to Oppose Change of Venue and Transfer. Appearances: Dwayne Timmof, Esq., of Nisson, Pincin & Hill (530) 246-4201 x 100, appearing for Defendant Winco Foods, LLC and opposing party; William F. Fitzgerald, Esq. of Narayan & Hudson, (415) 227-2328 appearing for Defendant Source Refrigeration & HVAC, Inc.; Joe Pat Hawkins, In Pro Per Plaintiff and Paula Hawkins In Pro Per Plaintiff (925) 439-7079 Appearing thru CourtCall, and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Off Calendar, REDUNDANT, NOT PROPER MOTION. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
